transcript: What name is that shipment addressed to? Whose name?
Helian Ointment? And whose... name is it on that placed the order?
Alright, Helia Ointment, Gorilla Ointment... Ointment, I want to know who is the person's name, who made the order?

Excuse me. I don't care about all the names of the ointments, sir. You... we... you and I have a communication problem. You're not listening. Whose name... is that shipment addressed to? Who is the receiver?
That would be you, at this time...
No, it wouldn't be me, because I do not place orders.
How about if you, uh... how about if I hurled the ointment at you? How does that sound?
Excuse me, sir. You are a very, very... obnoxious... person. And if this is... uh... one of these crank... telephone sales calls... forget it. I'm very familiar with boiler room operations.
How about if I squirted the ointment at you, madam?
Uh... excuse me, sir? Go to hell and have a nice day.
[accented] Ah, yes, madam? Uh, I'm the supervisor of ointment, uh... and believe...
What's the name of your company?
What's the name of your company?
[accented] Uhh... why must we divulge something so trivial, ma'am?
It isn't trivial, sir, when I am involving the Aurora Police Department.
[accented] Into what? I do not unders--
[accented] I do not understand your ointment, to be frank with you.
Excuse me, sir. Nobody ordered ointment. You cannot give me the name of the receiver, you cannot give me the date that the shipment was placed. You won't divulge the name of this...
[accented] Look at, ma'am... look at, look at our perspective.
[accented] You are going to be tumbling through ointment very shortly. How does that grab you?
Oh, go to hell with that ointment shit, okay? I do not have the time, or the patience... or the inclination or desire to continue this conversation. And don't call this number again.
